mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRAFFIC_REDIS_USAGE_DELTA ( trace_id, pool_type, line_id, family_id, app_id, used_bytes, usage_date, target_month, status, retry_count, created_at, status_updated_at ) VALUES ( #{traceId}, #{poolType}, #{lineId}, #{familyId}, #{appId}, #{usedBytes}, #{usageDate}, #{targetMonth}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, NOW(6), NOW(6) ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = id
mapper.select: SELECT id, trace_id, pool_type, line_id, family_id, app_id, used_bytes, usage_date, target_month, status, retry_count, last_error_message, created_at, status_updated_at FROM TRAFFIC_REDIS_USAGE_DELTA WHERE ( status = 'PENDING' OR status = 'FAIL' OR ( status = 'PROCESSING' AND status_updated_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(6), INTERVAL #{processingStuckSeconds} SECOND) ) ) ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
mapper.update: UPDATE TRAFFIC_REDIS_USAGE_DELTA SET status = 'PROCESSING', status_updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND status <> 'SUCCESS'
UPDATE TRAFFIC_REDIS_USAGE_DELTA SET status = 'SUCCESS', status_updated_at = NOW(6), last_error_message = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE TRAFFIC_REDIS_USAGE_DELTA SET status = 'FAIL', retry_count = retry_count + 1, last_error_message = #{lastErrorMessage}, status_updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND status <> 'SUCCESS'
UPDATE TRAFFIC_REDIS_USAGE_DELTA SET status = 'FAIL', retry_count = #{retryCount}, last_error_message = #{lastErrorMessage}, status_updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND status <> 'SUCCESS'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAFFIC_REDIS_USAGE_DELTA WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'FAIL', 'PROCESSING')
